title: Mouthwatering Smoky Brazilian Perilla Leaf Skewers
description: A savory Brazilian dish featuring perilla leaf, perfect for a low-carb and energizing meal. The char-grilled flavor brings out the best in this shaggy and mouthwatering skewer.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the perilla leaves to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated perilla leaves and chicken breast pieces onto skewers.
Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking and grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally.
Brush the skewers with lime juice during the last 2 minutes of grilling.
Remove the skewers from the grill and let them rest for 2 minutes.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional perilla leaves if desired.
Cook poultry to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F before serving.
